query:
SELECT u.name, uesl.digestType, uesl.status, uesl.sentDate, uesl.weekKey, uesl.itemCount, uesl.dryRun, uesl.error, uesl.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog uesl
JOIN users u ON u.id = uesl.userId
WHERE uesl.digestType = 'thursday' 
  AND u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Leo Williams ')
ORDER BY uesl.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

FROM userEmailSendLog uesl
JOIN users u ON u.id = uesl.userId
WHERE uesl.digestType = 'thursday' 
  AND u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Brett Hansen', 'Leo Williams ')
ORDER BY uesl.sentAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
